creator: vdeffont@ifrance.com
text:
Seems the port of gtk doesnt create a "gtk-config" link or executable.
Seems to me, ftk-config is required by some programs at configure time.
For now, the solution I found was to manually link /usr/X11R6/bin/gtk12-config to ~samedir/gtk-config but it could be done at install of gtk port, no?

Fix: 

create the link at gtk install time.
How-To-Repeat: try to run gtk-config on a fresh-installed gtk installed system.
